title: Update copyright year in LICENSE to 2026
description: Annual copyright year update in the LICENSE file from 2025 to 2026.
diff:
diff --git a/LICENSE b/LICENSE
index 1a2b3c4..d5e6f7a 100644
--- a/LICENSE
+++ b/LICENSE
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 MIT License
 
-Copyright (c) 2025 Acme Corp
+Copyright (c) 2026 Acme Corp
 
 Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
author: victor
